reviews.review_description: It doesn't seem bad at all, as long as you should not always stay at the same point waiting for enemies and harmful stuff to be wearing you, otherwise it looks more like a musical game. And maybe customizable colors, because everyone has different tastes and therefore different preferences. And maybe an honest price.

developer_response.body: The full game is now released. It's not a musical rhythm game as you suggest, but an arcade sword slicing and defense game where you block laser fire and slice enemies with various melee weapons.  There are 30 missions along with boss battles and bonus rounds. Though we took your suggestion and added the ability to customize the color blade of each of the main weapons which you can display in your home apartment.
